boundary_binding.action_boundary: May facilities allow contractor site work to begin?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: END-IRI-089 explicitly confirms: Iris Installers at Site 4Q, umbrella liability, currently bound CE-12, effective before work begins—matching all five policy elements of STD-IRI-089-P (contractor, site, coverage type, work start date, insurance-status class).
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: END-IRI-089 closes exact action boundary by confirming all five required elements before execution date.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Prior ESCALATEs misinterpreted WARN-IRI-089 warning tone as blocking evidence rather than stale-adjacent disclaimer; failed to match actual END-IRI-089 content against action boundary requirements.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Work date 2026-06-28 matches END-IRI-089 'effective before work begins'; no 082-style trap present—facilities authorization derives from binding endorsement, not facilities' independent review.

critical_features_preserved: action boundary matched to controlling source
warning tone distinguished from closure evidence
final_answer: END-IRI-089 explicitly confirms Iris Installers at Site 4Q, umbrella liability, currently bound CE-12, effective before work begins on 2026-06-28. This matches all five policy elements in STD-IRI-089-P for contractor site start closure. WARN-IRI-089 is stale-adjacent warning tone only; it does not block the endorsement evidence. The source boundary is closed; facilities may allow contractor site work to begin.
